**Input:**
```json
{
  "filePath": "/Users/viriya/dev/kiseki/userland/apps/SystemUIServer.app/SystemUIServer.m",
  "content": "/*\n * Kiseki OS - SystemUIServer.app\n *\n * The right-side menu bar extras process, matching macOS architecture:\n *   - Displays a clock in the top-right area of the menu bar\n *   - Connects to WindowServer by creating a small borderless window\n *     positioned at the top-right of the screen\n *   - Runs as a separate AppKit process launched by loginwindow\n *\n * On macOS, SystemUIServer manages the right side of the menu bar\n * (clock, Wi-Fi, battery, volume, Spotlight, Siri, etc.).  Our\n * SystemUIServer creates a single borderless window at (1120, 0)\n * with size 160x22 that sits in the menu bar area and draws a\n * clock display.\n *\n * The clock updates every minute via a custom run loop that polls\n * CFAbsoluteTimeGetCurrent() between WindowServer event checks.\n *\n * Compiled with COMDAT-stripping pipeline (same as AppKit).\n */\n\n#import <AppKit/AppKit.h>\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * ObjC runtime functions for dynamic class creation\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nextern Class  objc_allocateClassPair(Class superclass, const char *name, size_t extraBytes);\nextern void   objc_registerClassPair(Class cls);\nextern BOOL   class_addMethod(Class cls, SEL name, IMP imp, const char *types);\nextern void  *objc_autoreleasePoolPush(void);\nextern void   objc_autoreleasePoolPop(void *pool);\n\n/* C library extras not in framework headers */\nextern int    fprintf(void *stream, const char *fmt, ...);\nextern void **__stderrp;\n#define stderr (*__stderrp)\n\n/* Screen dimensions (matching WindowServer) */\n#define SCREEN_WIDTH    1280\n#define SCREEN_HEIGHT   800\n#define MENUBAR_HEIGHT  22\n\n/* Clock window: positioned at top-right of menu bar */\n#define CLOCK_X         1120\n#define CLOCK_Y         0\n#define CLOCK_WIDTH     160\n#define CLOCK_HEIGHT    MENUBAR_HEIGHT\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * ClockView — Custom NSView subclass for the clock display\n * ============================================================================ */\n\n/*\n * Compute static clock string.  We attempt CFAbsoluteTimeGetCurrent() to\n * derive hours:minutes, but since our kernel may not have real time yet\n * we fall back to \"12:00\" if the result looks unreasonable.\n *\n * CFAbsoluteTime is seconds since 2001-01-01 00:00:00 UTC.\n */\nstatic void _clockGetTimeString(char *buf, size_t buflen) {\n    (void)buflen;\n\n    /* Try to derive HH:MM from CFAbsoluteTime */\n    CFAbsoluteTime now = CFAbsoluteTimeGetCurrent();\n\n    /* Sanity check: if now is zero or negative, time is not available */\n    if (now <= 0.0) {\n        buf[0] = '1'; buf[1] = '2'; buf[2] = ':';\n        buf[3] = '0'; buf[4] = '0'; buf[5] = '\\0';\n        return;\n    }\n\n    /* Convert to seconds-of-day (UTC).  Good enough for a clock display. */\n    /* seconds since midnight = now mod 86400 */\n    double day_seconds = now - (double)((long)(now / 86400.0)) * 86400.0;\n    if (day_seconds < 0.0) day_seconds += 86400.0;\n\n    int total_minutes = (int)(day_seconds / 60.0);\n    int hours   = (total_minutes / 60) % 24;\n    int minutes = total_minutes % 60;\n\n    /* Format as HH:MM */\n    buf[0] = (char)('0' + (hours / 10));\n    buf[1] = (char)('0' + (hours % 10));\n    buf[2] = ':';\n    buf[3] = (char)('0' + (minutes / 10));\n    buf[4] = (char)('0' + (minutes % 10));\n    buf[5] = '\\0';\n}\n\n/*\n * _ClockDrawRect — drawRect: implementation for ClockView\n */\nstatic id _ClockDrawRect(id self, SEL _cmd, CGRect dirtyRect) {\n    (void)self; (void)_cmd; (void)dirtyRect;\n\n    /* Get the backing CGContext from NSGraphicsContext */\n    NSGraphicsContext *gctx = [NSGraphicsContext currentContext];\n    if (!gctx) return nil;\n\n    CGContextRef ctx = [gctx CGContext];\n    if (!ctx) return nil;\n\n    CGRect frame = CGRectMake(0, 0, CLOCK_WIDTH, CLOCK_HEIGHT);\n\n    /*\n     * Draw menu bar background matching WindowServer's menu bar colour.\n     * WindowServer renders the menu bar as (0.96, 0.96, 0.96) — we match\n     * that exactly so this window blends seamlessly into the menu bar.\n     */\n    CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.96, 0.96, 0.96, 1.0);\n    CGContextFillRect(ctx, frame);\n\n    /* Get current time string */\n    char timebuf[8];\n    _clockGetTimeString(timebuf, sizeof(timebuf));\n    size_t timelen = 5;  /* \"HH:MM\" is always 5 chars */\n\n    /*\n     * Draw clock text — dark text on light menu bar, matching macOS.\n     * macOS uses black text in the menu bar for the clock.\n     * Each character is roughly 8px wide in the system bitmap font.\n     */\n    CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);\n\n    CGFloat textWidth = (CGFloat)(timelen * 8);\n    CGFloat textX = (CLOCK_WIDTH - textWidth) / 2.0;\n    CGFloat textY = (CLOCK_HEIGHT - 12.0) / 2.0;  /* approx vertical centre */\n\n    CGContextShowTextAtPoint(ctx, textX, textY, timebuf, timelen);\n\n    return nil;\n}\n\n/* Global reference to clock window and view for periodic redraw */\nstatic NSWindow *g_clockWindow = nil;\nstatic NSView   *g_clockView = nil;\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * SystemUIServerDelegate — applicationDidFinishLaunching:\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nstatic id _sysUIAppDidFinishLaunching(id self, SEL _cmd, id notification) {\n    (void)self; (void)_cmd; (void)notification;\n\n    /* --- Create clock window --- */\n    NSWindow *clockWindow = [[NSWindow alloc]\n        initWithContentRect:CGRectMake(CLOCK_X, CLOCK_Y, CLOCK_WIDTH, CLOCK_HEIGHT)\n                  styleMask:NSWindowStyleMaskBorderless\n                    backing:NSBackingStoreBuffered\n                      defer:NO];\n\n    [clockWindow setTitle:(id)CFSTR(\"SystemUIServer\")];\n\n    /* Create ClockView class dynamically */\n    Class ClockView = objc_allocateClassPair([NSView class], \"ClockView\", 0);\n    class_addMethod(ClockView, @selector(drawRect:),\n                    (IMP)_ClockDrawRect, \"v@:{CGRect=dddd}\");\n    objc_registerClassPair(ClockView);\n\n    NSView *clockView = [[ClockView alloc]\n        initWithFrame:CGRectMake(0, 0, CLOCK_WIDTH, CLOCK_HEIGHT)];\n\n    [clockWindow setContentView:clockView];\n    [clockWindow makeKeyAndOrderFront:nil];\n\n    /* Store global references for periodic clock updates */\n    g_clockWindow = clockWindow;\n    g_clockView = clockView;\n\n    /* --- Set up menu --- */\n    NSMenu *menu = [[NSMenu alloc] initWithTitle:(id)CFSTR(\"SystemUIServer\")];\n    [NSApp setMainMenu:menu];\n\n    fprintf(stderr, \"[SystemUIServer] Clock window created at (%d, %d) size %dx%d\\n\",\n            CLOCK_X, CLOCK_Y, CLOCK_WIDTH, CLOCK_HEIGHT);\n    return nil;\n}\n\n/* Track last minute drawn so we only redraw when the minute changes */\nstatic int g_lastMinuteDrawn = -1;\n\n/*\n * _clockNeedsUpdate — Check if the displayed minute has changed.\n *\n * Returns YES if the clock needs redrawing.\n */\nstatic BOOL _clockNeedsUpdate(void) {\n    CFAbsoluteTime now = CFAbsoluteTimeGetCurrent();\n    if (now <= 0.0) return NO;\n\n    double day_seconds = now - (double)((long)(now / 86400.0)) * 86400.0;\n    if (day_seconds < 0.0) day_seconds += 86400.0;\n\n    int total_minutes = (int)(day_seconds / 60.0);\n    int current_minute = total_minutes % (24 * 60);\n\n    if (current_minute != g_lastMinuteDrawn) {\n        g_lastMinuteDrawn = current_minute;\n        return YES;\n    }\n    return NO;\n}\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * main — Entry point\n *\n * Uses a custom run loop (like Terminal.app) to periodically update\n * the clock display.  On macOS, SystemUIServer uses NSTimer or\n * CFRunLoopTimer for this; we poll on each event loop iteration\n * since our AppKit doesn't have NSTimer support yet.\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nint main(int argc, const char *argv[]) {\n    (void)argc; (void)argv;\n    void *pool = objc_autoreleasePoolPush();\n\n    /* Create shared application */\n    [NSApplication sharedApplication];\n\n    /* Create delegate class dynamically */\n    Class SystemUIServerDelegate = objc_allocateClassPair(\n        [NSObject class], \"SystemUIServerDelegate\", 0);\n    class_addMethod(SystemUIServerDelegate,\n                    @selector(applicationDidFinishLaunching:),\n                    (IMP)_sysUIAppDidFinishLaunching, \"v@:@\");\n    objc_registerClassPair(SystemUIServerDelegate);\n\n    /* Create delegate instance and set on NSApp */\n    id delegate = [SystemUIServerDelegate new];\n    [NSApp setDelegate:delegate];\n\n    /*\n     * Custom run loop with clock update polling.\n     *\n     * On macOS, SystemUIServer uses NSTimer / CFRunLoopTimer to\n     * schedule clock updates every 60 seconds.  Since our AppKit\n     * doesn't have NSTimer yet, we check on each event loop\n     * iteration whether the minute has changed.\n     */\n    [NSApp finishLaunching];\n\n    for (;;) {\n        /* Poll WindowServer for events */\n        NSEvent *event = [NSApp nextEventMatchingMask:(NSUInteger)0xFFFFFFFF\n                                            untilDate:nil\n                                               inMode:(id)CFSTR(\"kCFRunLoopDefaultMode\")\n                                              dequeue:YES];\n\n        if (event) {\n            [NSApp sendEvent:event];\n        }\n\n        /* Check if clock needs updating (minute changed) */\n        if (_clockNeedsUpdate() && g_clockView) {\n            [g_clockView setNeedsDisplay:YES];\n        }\n\n        /* Display dirty windows */\n        if (g_clockWindow) {\n            [g_clockWindow displayIfNeeded];\n        }\n    }\n\n    objc_autoreleasePoolPop(pool);\n    return 0;\n}\n"
}
```

```json
{
  "filePath": "/Users/viriya/dev/kiseki/userland/apps/Finder.app/Finder.m",
  "content": "/*\n * Kiseki OS - Finder.app\n *\n * The Finder process, matching macOS architecture:\n *   - Shows desktop icons and file browser windows\n *   - Reads the real filesystem via opendir/readdir/stat\n *   - Displays files with type-appropriate icons (folder, file, symlink,\n *     device, executable, .app bundle)\n *   - Supports directory navigation: double-click enters folders,\n *     back button returns to parent\n *   - Double-click .app bundles or executables to launch them (fork+execve)\n *   - Sidebar with favourite filesystem locations\n *   - Runs as a separate AppKit process launched by loginwindow\n *\n * On macOS, the Finder is the default file manager and desktop icon\n * host.  Our Finder reads the real filesystem and provides a functional\n * file browser.\n *\n * Compiled with COMDAT-stripping pipeline (same as AppKit).\n */\n\n#import <AppKit/AppKit.h>\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * ObjC runtime functions for dynamic class creation\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nextern Class  objc_allocateClassPair(Class superclass, const char *name, size_t extraBytes);\nextern void   objc_registerClassPair(Class cls);\nextern BOOL   class_addMethod(Class cls, SEL name, IMP imp, const char *types);\nextern void  *objc_autoreleasePoolPush(void);\nextern void   objc_autoreleasePoolPop(void *pool);\n\n/* C library extras not in framework headers */\nextern int    fprintf(void *stream, const char *fmt, ...);\nextern int    snprintf(char *str, size_t size, const char *fmt, ...);\nextern int    strcmp(const char *s1, const char *s2);\nextern char  *strcpy(char *dst, const char *src);\nextern char  *strncpy(char *dst, const char *src, size_t n);\nextern char  *strcat(char *dst, const char *src);\nextern char  *strrchr(const char *s, int c);\nextern char  *strstr(const char *haystack, const char *needle);\nextern void **__stderrp;\n#define stderr (*__stderrp)\n\n/* Darwin stat types (matching sys/stat.h) */\ntypedef int32_t             dev_t;\ntypedef uint16_t            mode_t;\ntypedef uint16_t            nlink_t;\ntypedef uint64_t            ino_t;\ntypedef uint32_t            uid_t;\ntypedef uint32_t            gid_t;\ntypedef int64_t             off_t;\ntypedef int64_t             blkcnt_t;\ntypedef int32_t             blksize_t;\ntypedef int32_t             pid_t;\n\nstruct timespec {\n    int64_t tv_sec;\n    int64_t tv_nsec;\n};\n\n/* POSIX filesystem syscalls from libSystem */\nstruct dirent {\n    uint64_t    d_ino;\n    uint64_t    d_seekoff;\n    uint16_t    d_reclen;\n    uint16_t    d_namlen;\n    uint8_t     d_type;\n    char        d_name[1024];\n};\n\n/* DT_* constants */\n#define DT_UNKNOWN  0\n#define DT_DIR      4\n#define DT_REG      8\n#define DT_LNK      10\n#define DT_CHR      2\n#define DT_BLK      6\n#define DT_FIFO     1\n#define DT_SOCK     12\n\n/* DIR is opaque — we just need the pointer type */\ntypedef struct {\n    int     fd;\n    size_t  buf_pos;\n    size_t  buf_len;\n    char    buf[8192];\n} DIR;\n\nextern DIR           *opendir(const char *name);\nextern struct dirent *readdir(DIR *dirp);\nextern int            closedir(DIR *dirp);\n\n/* struct stat — Darwin arm64 ABI (144 bytes) */\nstruct stat {\n    dev_t               st_dev;\n    mode_t              st_mode;\n    nlink_t             st_nlink;\n    ino_t               st_ino;\n    uid_t               st_uid;\n    gid_t               st_gid;\n    dev_t               st_rdev;\n    uint32_t            __pad0;\n    struct timespec     st_atimespec;\n    struct timespec     st_mtimespec;\n    struct timespec     st_ctimespec;\n    struct timespec     st_birthtimespec;\n    off_t               st_size;\n    blkcnt_t            st_blocks;\n    blksize_t           st_blksize;\n    uint32_t            st_flags;\n    uint32_t            st_gen;\n    int32_t             st_lspare;\n    int64_t             st_qspare[2];\n};\n\n#define S_IFMT      0170000\n#define S_IFDIR     0040000\n#define S_IFREG     0100000\n#define S_IFLNK     0120000\n#define S_IFCHR     0020000\n#define S_IFBLK     0060000\n#define S_IFIFO     0010000\n#define S_IFSOCK    0140000\n#define S_ISDIR(m)  (((m) & S_IFMT) == S_IFDIR)\n#define S_ISREG(m)  (((m) & S_IFMT) == S_IFREG)\n#define S_ISLNK(m)  (((m) & S_IFMT) == S_IFLNK)\n#define S_ISCHR(m)  (((m) & S_IFMT) == S_IFCHR)\n#define S_ISBLK(m)  (((m) & S_IFMT) == S_IFBLK)\n#define S_IXUSR     0000100\n#define S_IXGRP     0000010\n#define S_IXOTH     0000001\n\nextern int stat(const char *path, struct stat *buf);\nextern int lstat(const char *path, struct stat *buf);\n\n/* Process creation for app launching */\nextern pid_t fork(void);\nextern int   execve(const char *path, char *const argv[], char *const envp[]);\nextern void  _exit(int status) __attribute__((noreturn));\nextern pid_t setsid(void);\nextern char *getenv(const char *name);\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * Finder Layout Constants\n * ============================================================================ */\n\n#define FINDER_WIN_X        50\n#define FINDER_WIN_Y        50\n#define FINDER_WIN_W        500\n#define FINDER_WIN_H        380\n\n#define SIDEBAR_W           120.0\n#define HEADER_H            28.0\n#define ITEM_HEIGHT         24.0\n#define ITEM_PAD_X          8.0\n#define ICON_SIZE           16.0\n#define ICON_TEXT_GAP       6.0\n\n/* Maximum directory entries we'll display */\n#define MAX_ENTRIES         128\n\n/* Maximum path length */\n#define PATH_MAX            1024\n\n#define FINDER_STYLE_MASK (NSWindowStyleMaskTitled | NSWindowStyleMaskClosable | \\\n                           NSWindowStyleMaskMiniaturizable | NSWindowStyleMaskResizable)\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * File Entry — Represents one directory entry with stat info\n * ============================================================================ */\n\ntypedef struct {\n    char        name[256];\n    uint8_t     d_type;         /* DT_DIR, DT_REG, etc. (from readdir) */\n    mode_t      mode;           /* From stat() */\n    off_t       size;           /* File size */\n    BOOL        is_dir;\n    BOOL        is_symlink;\n    BOOL        is_executable;\n    BOOL        is_device;\n    BOOL        is_app_bundle;  /* Directory ending in \".app\" */\n} FinderEntry;\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * Finder State — Global for the single-window browser\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nstatic char         g_current_path[PATH_MAX] = \"/\";\nstatic FinderEntry  g_entries[MAX_ENTRIES];\nstatic int          g_entry_count = 0;\nstatic int          g_selected_idx = -1;    /* Currently selected entry */\nstatic int          g_scroll_offset = 0;    /* Scroll position (entry index) */\nstatic NSView      *g_finderView = nil;\nstatic NSWindow    *g_finderWindow = nil;\n\n/* Sidebar favourite paths */\nstatic const char *sidebar_favourites[] = {\n    \"/\",\n    \"/Applications\",\n    \"/System\",\n    \"/Users\",\n    \"/bin\",\n    \"/sbin\",\n    \"/etc\",\n    \"/tmp\",\n};\nstatic const int sidebar_favourite_count = 8;\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * Directory Reading — Uses real opendir/readdir/stat\n * ============================================================================ */\n\n/*\n * finder_read_directory — Scan the current directory and populate g_entries.\n *\n * Calls opendir/readdir to enumerate entries, then stat() on each to get\n * mode, size, and type information.  Entries are sorted with directories\n * first, then alphabetically.\n */\nstatic void finder_read_directory(void)\n{\n    g_entry_count = 0;\n    g_selected_idx = -1;\n    g_scroll_offset = 0;\n\n    DIR *dir = opendir(g_current_path);\n    if (!dir) {\n        fprintf(stderr, \"[Finder] opendir(%s) failed\\n\", g_current_path);\n        return;\n    }\n\n    struct dirent *de;\n    while ((de = readdir(dir)) != NULL && g_entry_count < MAX_ENTRIES) {\n        /* Skip . and .. */\n        if (de->d_name[0] == '.' && de->d_name[1] == '\\0')\n            continue;\n        if (de->d_name[0] == '.' && de->d_name[1] == '.' && de->d_name[2] == '\\0')\n            continue;\n\n        FinderEntry *ent = &g_entries[g_entry_count];\n        strncpy(ent->name, de->d_name, 255);\n        ent->name[255] = '\\0';\n        ent->d_type = de->d_type;\n        ent->mode = 0;\n        ent->size = 0;\n        ent->is_dir = (de->d_type == DT_DIR);\n        ent->is_symlink = (de->d_type == DT_LNK);\n        ent->is_executable = NO;\n        ent->is_device = (de->d_type == DT_CHR || de->d_type == DT_BLK);\n        ent->is_app_bundle = NO;\n\n        /* stat() to get detailed info */\n        char fullpath[PATH_MAX];\n        size_t plen = strlen(g_current_path);\n        if (plen > 0 && g_current_path[plen - 1] == '/') {\n            snprintf(fullpath, PATH_MAX, \"%s%s\", g_current_path, de->d_name);\n        } else {\n            snprintf(fullpath, PATH_MAX, \"%s/%s\", g_current_path, de->d_name);\n        }\n\n        struct stat sb;\n        if (stat(fullpath, &sb) == 0) {\n            ent->mode = sb.st_mode;\n            ent->size = sb.st_size;\n            ent->is_dir = S_ISDIR(sb.st_mode);\n            ent->is_symlink = S_ISLNK(sb.st_mode);\n            ent->is_device = S_ISCHR(sb.st_mode) || S_ISBLK(sb.st_mode);\n            ent->is_executable = !ent->is_dir &&\n                ((sb.st_mode & S_IXUSR) || (sb.st_mode & S_IXGRP) || (sb.st_mode & S_IXOTH));\n\n            /* Detect .app bundles — directories whose name ends in \".app\" */\n            if (ent->is_dir) {\n                size_t nlen = strlen(ent->name);\n                if (nlen >= 4 && strcmp(ent->name + nlen - 4, \".app\") == 0) {\n                    ent->is_app_bundle = YES;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        g_entry_count++;\n    }\n\n    closedir(dir);\n\n    /*\n     * Sort: directories first, then alphabetically within each group.\n     * Simple bubble sort — adequate for <=128 entries.\n     */\n    for (int i = 0; i < g_entry_count - 1; i++) {\n        for (int j = i + 1; j < g_entry_count; j++) {\n            BOOL swap = NO;\n            if (g_entries[i].is_dir && g_entries[j].is_dir) {\n                if (strcmp(g_entries[i].name, g_entries[j].name) > 0)\n                    swap = YES;\n            } else if (!g_entries[i].is_dir && g_entries[j].is_dir) {\n                swap = YES;\n            } else if (g_entries[i].is_dir && !g_entries[j].is_dir) {\n                /* Dir before file: keep */\n            } else {\n                if (strcmp(g_entries[i].name, g_entries[j].name) > 0)\n                    swap = YES;\n            }\n            if (swap) {\n                FinderEntry tmp = g_entries[i];\n                g_entries[i] = g_entries[j];\n                g_entries[j] = tmp;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    fprintf(stderr, \"[Finder] Read %d entries from %s\\n\",\n            g_entry_count, g_current_path);\n}\n\n/*\n * finder_navigate_to — Change to a new directory path.\n */\nstatic void finder_navigate_to(const char *path)\n{\n    strncpy(g_current_path, path, PATH_MAX - 1);\n    g_current_path[PATH_MAX - 1] = '\\0';\n    finder_read_directory();\n}\n\n/*\n * finder_navigate_into — Enter a subdirectory by name.\n */\nstatic void finder_navigate_into(const char *name)\n{\n    char newpath[PATH_MAX];\n    size_t plen = strlen(g_current_path);\n    if (plen > 0 && g_current_path[plen - 1] == '/') {\n        snprintf(newpath, PATH_MAX, \"%s%s\", g_current_path, name);\n    } else {\n        snprintf(newpath, PATH_MAX, \"%s/%s\", g_current_path, name);\n    }\n    finder_navigate_to(newpath);\n}\n\n/*\n * finder_navigate_parent — Go up one directory level.\n */\nstatic void finder_navigate_parent(void)\n{\n    if (strcmp(g_current_path, \"/\") == 0) return;\n\n    size_t len = strlen(g_current_path);\n    if (len > 1 && g_current_path[len - 1] == '/') {\n        g_current_path[len - 1] = '\\0';\n        len--;\n    }\n    while (len > 0 && g_current_path[len - 1] != '/')\n        len--;\n    if (len == 0) len = 1;\n    g_current_path[len] = '\\0';\n\n    finder_read_directory();\n}\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * File Size Formatting\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nstatic void format_size(off_t size, char *buf, size_t buflen)\n{\n    if (size < 1024) {\n        snprintf(buf, buflen, \"%d B\", (int)size);\n    } else if (size < 1024 * 1024) {\n        snprintf(buf, buflen, \"%d KB\", (int)(size / 1024));\n    } else {\n        snprintf(buf, buflen, \"%d MB\", (int)(size / (1024 * 1024)));\n    }\n}\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * Application Launching\n *\n * On macOS, double-clicking a .app bundle in Finder invokes LaunchServices,\n * which reads Info.plist to find CFBundleExecutable and spawns the process.\n *\n * We use a simplified convention: the executable inside Foo.app is\n * Foo.app/Foo (strip the .app suffix to get the binary name).  This matches\n * our disk layout (e.g. /Applications/Terminal.app/Terminal).\n *\n * For non-.app executables (binaries in /bin, /sbin, etc.), we fork+execve\n * them directly.\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nstatic int finder_resolve_app_executable(const char *app_path, char *exe_buf, size_t exe_buflen)\n{\n    const char *base = strrchr(app_path, '/');\n    if (base) {\n        base++;\n    } else {\n        base = app_path;\n    }\n\n    size_t blen = strlen(base);\n    if (blen < 5 || strcmp(base + blen - 4, \".app\") != 0) {\n        return -1;\n    }\n\n    char exe_name[256];\n    if (blen - 4 >= sizeof(exe_name)) return -1;\n    memcpy(exe_name, base, blen - 4);\n    exe_name[blen - 4] = '\\0';\n\n    snprintf(exe_buf, exe_buflen, \"%s/%s\", app_path, exe_name);\n    return 0;\n}\n\nstatic void finder_launch_executable(const char *exe_path)\n{\n    struct stat sb;\n    if (stat(exe_path, &sb) < 0) {\n        fprintf(stderr, \"[Finder] Cannot stat '%s' — not launching\\n\", exe_path);\n        return;\n    }\n    if (S_ISDIR(sb.st_mode)) {\n        fprintf(stderr, \"[Finder] '%s' is a directory — not launching\\n\", exe_path);\n        return;\n    }\n    if (!(sb.st_mode & (S_IXUSR | S_IXGRP | S_IXOTH))) {\n        fprintf(stderr, \"[Finder] '%s' is not executable — not launching\\n\", exe_path);\n        return;\n    }\n\n    pid_t pid = fork();\n    if (pid < 0) {\n        fprintf(stderr, \"[Finder] fork() failed for '%s'\\n\", exe_path);\n        return;\n    }\n    if (pid == 0) {\n        /* Child process */\n        setsid();\n\n        const char *home    = getenv(\"HOME\");\n        const char *user    = getenv(\"USER\");\n        const char *logname = getenv(\"LOGNAME\");\n        const char *shell   = getenv(\"SHELL\");\n        const char *path    = getenv(\"PATH\");\n        const char *term    = getenv(\"TERM\");\n\n        char env_home[80], env_user[48], env_logname[48];\n        char env_shell[48], env_path[256], env_term[32];\n\n        snprintf(env_home,    sizeof(env_home),    \"HOME=%s\",    home    ? home    : \"/root\");\n        snprintf(env_user,    sizeof(env_user),    \"USER=%s\",    user    ? user    : \"root\");\n        snprintf(env_logname, sizeof(env_logname), \"LOGNAME=%s\", logname ? logname : \"root\");\n        snprintf(env_shell,   sizeof(env_shell),   \"SHELL=%s\",   shell   ? shell   : \"/bin/bash\");\n        snprintf(env_path,    sizeof(env_path),    \"PATH=%s\",    path    ? path    : \"/bin:/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/Applications\");\n        snprintf(env_term,    sizeof(env_term),    \"TERM=%s\",    term    ? term    : \"vt100\");\n\n        char *argv[] = { (char *)exe_path, NULL };\n        char *envp[] = {\n            env_home,\n            env_path,\n            env_term,\n            env_shell,\n            env_user,\n            env_logname,\n            NULL\n        };\n\n        execve(exe_path, argv, envp);\n        _exit(127);\n    }\n\n    /* Parent */\n    fprintf(stderr, \"[Finder] Launched '%s' (PID %d)\\n\", exe_path, (int)pid);\n}\n\nstatic void finder_open_item(int idx)\n{\n    if (idx < 0 || idx >= g_entry_count) return;\n\n    FinderEntry *ent = &g_entries[idx];\n\n    char fullpath[PATH_MAX];\n    size_t plen = strlen(g_current_path);\n    if (plen > 0 && g_current_path[plen - 1] == '/') {\n        snprintf(fullpath, PATH_MAX, \"%s%s\", g_current_path, ent->name);\n    } else {\n        snprintf(fullpath, PATH_MAX, \"%s/%s\", g_current_path, ent->name);\n    }\n\n    if (ent->is_app_bundle) {\n        char exe_path[PATH_MAX];\n        if (finder_resolve_app_executable(fullpath, exe_path, sizeof(exe_path)) == 0) {\n            fprintf(stderr, \"[Finder] Opening app bundle: %s → %s\\n\", fullpath, exe_path);\n            finder_launch_executable(exe_path);\n        } else {\n            fprintf(stderr, \"[Finder] Failed to resolve executable in '%s'\\n\", fullpath);\n        }\n    } else if (ent->is_dir) {\n        finder_navigate_into(ent->name);\n    } else if (ent->is_executable) {\n        fprintf(stderr, \"[Finder] Launching executable: %s\\n\", fullpath);\n        finder_launch_executable(fullpath);\n    } else {\n        fprintf(stderr, \"[Finder] No handler for file: %s\\n\", fullpath);\n    }\n}\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * FinderView — Custom NSView subclass for the file browser\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nstatic id _FinderDrawRect(id self, SEL _cmd, CGRect dirtyRect) {\n    (void)self; (void)_cmd; (void)dirtyRect;\n\n    NSGraphicsContext *gctx = [NSGraphicsContext currentContext];\n    if (!gctx) return nil;\n\n    CGContextRef ctx = [gctx CGContext];\n    if (!ctx) return nil;\n\n    CGFloat W = (CGFloat)FINDER_WIN_W;\n    CGFloat H = (CGFloat)FINDER_WIN_H;\n\n    /* White background */\n    CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0);\n    CGContextFillRect(ctx, CGRectMake(0, 0, W, H));\n\n    /* --- Header bar at top --- */\n    CGFloat headerTop = H - HEADER_H;\n\n    /* Header background */\n    CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.94, 0.94, 0.94, 1.0);\n    CGContextFillRect(ctx, CGRectMake(0, headerTop, W, HEADER_H));\n\n    /* Header separator */\n    CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.78, 0.78, 0.78, 1.0);\n    CGContextFillRect(ctx, CGRectMake(0, headerTop, W, 1));\n\n    /* Back button (< arrow) — left side of header */\n    if (strcmp(g_current_path, \"/\") != 0) {\n        CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.20, 0.47, 0.95, 1.0);\n        CGContextShowTextAtPoint(ctx, 8.0, headerTop + 8.0, \"< Back\", 6);\n    }\n\n    /* Path text — centred in header */\n    CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.25, 0.25, 0.25, 1.0);\n    size_t pathlen = strlen(g_current_path);\n    if (pathlen > 50) pathlen = 50;\n    CGFloat pathX = SIDEBAR_W + 16.0;\n    CGContextShowTextAtPoint(ctx, pathX, headerTop + 8.0,\n                             g_current_path, pathlen);\n\n    /* --- Sidebar background --- */\n    CGFloat contentH = headerTop;\n    CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.95, 0.95, 0.95, 1.0);\n    CGContextFillRect(ctx, CGRectMake(0, 0, SIDEBAR_W, contentH));\n\n    /* Sidebar separator */\n    CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.82, 0.82, 0.82, 1.0);\n    CGContextFillRect(ctx, CGRectMake(SIDEBAR_W, 0, 1, contentH));\n\n    /* Sidebar title: \"Favourites\" */\n    CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.50, 0.50, 0.50, 1.0);\n    CGContextShowTextAtPoint(ctx, 8.0, contentH - 18.0, \"Favourites\", 10);\n\n    /* Sidebar favourite items */\n    for (int i = 0; i < sidebar_favourite_count; i++) {\n        CGFloat iy = contentH - 36.0 - (CGFloat)i * 20.0;\n        if (iy < 0) break;\n\n        /* Highlight if this is the current path */\n        if (strcmp(sidebar_favourites[i], g_current_path) == 0) {\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.20, 0.47, 0.95, 0.15);\n            CGContextFillRect(ctx, CGRectMake(0, iy - 2, SIDEBAR_W, 18));\n        }\n\n        /* Folder icon indicator */\n        CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.30, 0.55, 0.85, 1.0);\n        CGContextFillRect(ctx, CGRectMake(8, iy, 10, 12));\n\n        /* Label */\n        CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.15, 0.15, 0.15, 1.0);\n        const char *label = sidebar_favourites[i];\n        const char *display = label;\n        if (label[0] == '/' && label[1] != '\\0') {\n            const char *p = label + strlen(label) - 1;\n            while (p > label && *(p - 1) != '/') p--;\n            display = p;\n        }\n        size_t dlen = strlen(display);\n        if (dlen > 12) dlen = 12;\n        CGContextShowTextAtPoint(ctx, 24.0, iy, display, dlen);\n    }\n\n    /* --- Main content area: file listing --- */\n    CGFloat listX = SIDEBAR_W + ITEM_PAD_X;\n    CGFloat listTop = contentH - 4.0;\n    CGFloat listW = W - SIDEBAR_W - ITEM_PAD_X * 2;\n\n    /* Column headers */\n    CGFloat nameColX = listX + ICON_SIZE + ICON_TEXT_GAP;\n    CGFloat sizeColX = W - 80.0;\n\n    CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.50, 0.50, 0.50, 1.0);\n    CGContextShowTextAtPoint(ctx, nameColX, listTop - 12.0, \"Name\", 4);\n    CGContextShowTextAtPoint(ctx, sizeColX, listTop - 12.0, \"Size\", 4);\n\n    /* Header underline */\n    CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.85, 0.85, 0.85, 1.0);\n    CGContextFillRect(ctx, CGRectMake(SIDEBAR_W + 1, listTop - 18.0, listW + ITEM_PAD_X, 1));\n\n    CGFloat rowY = listTop - 22.0;\n    int visible_rows = (int)((rowY) / ITEM_HEIGHT);\n\n    for (int i = g_scroll_offset; i < g_entry_count && (i - g_scroll_offset) < visible_rows; i++) {\n        CGFloat iy = rowY - (CGFloat)(i - g_scroll_offset) * ITEM_HEIGHT;\n        if (iy < 0) break;\n\n        FinderEntry *ent = &g_entries[i];\n\n        /* Selection highlight */\n        if (i == g_selected_idx) {\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.20, 0.47, 0.95, 0.20);\n            CGContextFillRect(ctx, CGRectMake(SIDEBAR_W + 1, iy - 2, W - SIDEBAR_W - 1, ITEM_HEIGHT));\n        }\n\n        /* Alternating row background */\n        if ((i - g_scroll_offset) % 2 == 1 && i != g_selected_idx) {\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.97, 0.97, 0.97, 1.0);\n            CGContextFillRect(ctx, CGRectMake(SIDEBAR_W + 1, iy - 2, W - SIDEBAR_W - 1, ITEM_HEIGHT));\n        }\n\n        /* --- File type icon --- */\n        CGRect iconRect = CGRectMake(listX, iy, ICON_SIZE, ICON_SIZE);\n\n        if (ent->is_app_bundle) {\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.40, 0.40, 0.45, 1.0);\n            CGContextFillRect(ctx, iconRect);\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 0.9);\n            CGContextShowTextAtPoint(ctx, listX + 4, iy + 2, \"A\", 1);\n        } else if (ent->is_dir) {\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.30, 0.60, 0.95, 1.0);\n            CGContextFillRect(ctx, iconRect);\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.25, 0.50, 0.85, 1.0);\n            CGContextFillRect(ctx, CGRectMake(listX, iy + ICON_SIZE,\n                                               ICON_SIZE * 0.45, 3));\n        } else if (ent->is_symlink) {\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.30, 0.80, 0.80, 1.0);\n            CGContextFillRect(ctx, iconRect);\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8);\n            CGContextShowTextAtPoint(ctx, listX + 3, iy + 2, \"@\", 1);\n        } else if (ent->is_device) {\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.90, 0.60, 0.20, 1.0);\n            CGContextFillRect(ctx, iconRect);\n        } else if (ent->is_executable) {\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.30, 0.75, 0.30, 1.0);\n            CGContextFillRect(ctx, iconRect);\n        } else {\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0);\n            CGContextFillRect(ctx, iconRect);\n            CGContextSetRGBStrokeColor(ctx, 0.70, 0.70, 0.70, 1.0);\n            CGContextSetLineWidth(ctx, 1.0);\n            CGContextStrokeRect(ctx, iconRect);\n        }\n\n        /* --- File name --- */\n        CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.10, 0.10, 0.10, 1.0);\n        size_t namelen = strlen(ent->name);\n        if (namelen > 35) namelen = 35;\n        CGContextShowTextAtPoint(ctx, nameColX, iy + 2, ent->name, namelen);\n\n        /* --- File size (for non-directories) --- */\n        if (!ent->is_dir) {\n            char sizebuf[16];\n            format_size(ent->size, sizebuf, sizeof(sizebuf));\n            size_t slen = strlen(sizebuf);\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.45, 0.45, 0.45, 1.0);\n            CGContextShowTextAtPoint(ctx, sizeColX, iy + 2, sizebuf, slen);\n        } else {\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, 0.45, 0.45, 0.45, 1.0);\n            CGContextShowTextAtPoint(ctx, sizeColX, iy + 2, \"--\", 2);\n        }\n    }\n\n    (void)listW;\n    return nil;\n}\n\n/*\n * _FinderAcceptsFirstResponder — Must return YES for keyboard and mouse.\n */\nstatic BOOL _FinderAcceptsFirstResponder(id self, SEL _cmd) {\n    (void)self; (void)_cmd;\n    return YES;\n}\n\n/*\n * _FinderMouseDown — mouseDown: implementation for FinderView\n */\nstatic id _FinderMouseDown(id self, SEL _cmd, id theEvent) {\n    (void)_cmd;\n\n    NSEvent *event = (NSEvent *)theEvent;\n\n    /* Get click location in window coordinates */\n    CGPoint loc = [event locationInWindow];\n\n    CGFloat H = (CGFloat)FINDER_WIN_H;\n    CGFloat headerTop = H - HEADER_H;\n\n    /* Check if click is in header area */\n    if (loc.y >= headerTop) {\n        if (loc.x < SIDEBAR_W && strcmp(g_current_path, \"/\") != 0) {\n            finder_navigate_parent();\n            [(NSView *)self setNeedsDisplay:YES];\n            return nil;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /* Check if click is in sidebar */\n    if (loc.x < SIDEBAR_W && loc.y < headerTop) {\n        CGFloat contentH = headerTop;\n        for (int i = 0; i < sidebar_favourite_count; i++) {\n            CGFloat iy = contentH - 36.0 - (CGFloat)i * 20.0;\n            if (loc.y >= iy - 2 && loc.y < iy + 16) {\n                finder_navigate_to(sidebar_favourites[i]);\n                [(NSView *)self setNeedsDisplay:YES];\n                return nil;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    /* Check if click is in file listing area */\n    if (loc.x > SIDEBAR_W) {\n        CGFloat listTop = headerTop - 22.0;\n        int clicked_row = (int)((listTop - loc.y) / ITEM_HEIGHT);\n        int clicked_idx = g_scroll_offset + clicked_row;\n\n        if (clicked_idx >= 0 && clicked_idx < g_entry_count) {\n            NSInteger clickCount = [event clickCount];\n\n            if (clickCount >= 2) {\n                g_selected_idx = clicked_idx;\n                finder_open_item(clicked_idx);\n            } else {\n                g_selected_idx = clicked_idx;\n            }\n            [(NSView *)self setNeedsDisplay:YES];\n        }\n    }\n\n    return nil;\n}\n\n/*\n * _FinderKeyDown — keyDown: for keyboard navigation\n */\nstatic id _FinderKeyDown(id self, SEL _cmd, id theEvent) {\n    (void)_cmd;\n\n    NSEvent *event = (NSEvent *)theEvent;\n\n    NSString *chars = [event characters];\n    if (!chars) return nil;\n\n    uint16_t ch = [chars characterAtIndex:0];\n\n    uint16_t keyCode = [event keyCode];\n\n    /* Arrow keys (HID keycodes from WindowServer) */\n    #define KEY_UP_CODE     103\n    #define KEY_DOWN_CODE   108\n\n    BOOL changed = NO;\n\n    if (keyCode == KEY_UP_CODE) {\n        if (g_selected_idx > 0) {\n            g_selected_idx--;\n            if (g_selected_idx < g_scroll_offset)\n                g_scroll_offset = g_selected_idx;\n            changed = YES;\n        }\n    } else if (keyCode == KEY_DOWN_CODE) {\n        if (g_selected_idx < g_entry_count - 1) {\n            g_selected_idx++;\n            CGFloat headerTop = (CGFloat)FINDER_WIN_H - HEADER_H;\n            int visible_rows = (int)((headerTop - 22.0) / ITEM_HEIGHT);\n            if (g_selected_idx >= g_scroll_offset + visible_rows)\n                g_scroll_offset = g_selected_idx - visible_rows + 1;\n            changed = YES;\n        }\n    } else if (ch == 0x0D || ch == 0x0A) {\n        if (g_selected_idx >= 0 && g_selected_idx < g_entry_count) {\n            finder_open_item(g_selected_idx);\n            changed = YES;\n        }\n    } else if (ch == 0x7F || ch == 0x08) {\n        finder_navigate_parent();\n        changed = YES;\n    }\n\n    if (changed) {\n        [(NSView *)self setNeedsDisplay:YES];\n    }\n\n    return nil;\n}\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * FinderAppDelegate — applicationDidFinishLaunching:\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nstatic id _finderAppDidFinishLaunching(id self, SEL _cmd, id notification) {\n    (void)self; (void)_cmd; (void)notification;\n\n    /* Read the initial directory */\n    finder_read_directory();\n\n    /* Create the Finder browser window */\n    g_finderWindow = [[NSWindow alloc]\n        initWithContentRect:CGRectMake(FINDER_WIN_X, FINDER_WIN_Y, FINDER_WIN_W, FINDER_WIN_H)\n                  styleMask:(NSUInteger)FINDER_STYLE_MASK\n                    backing:NSBackingStoreBuffered\n                      defer:NO];\n\n    [g_finderWindow setTitle:(id)CFSTR(\"Finder\")];\n\n    /* Create FinderView class dynamically */\n    Class FinderView = objc_allocateClassPair([NSView class], \"FinderView\", 0);\n    class_addMethod(FinderView, @selector(drawRect:),\n                    (IMP)_FinderDrawRect, \"v@:{CGRect=dddd}\");\n    class_addMethod(FinderView, @selector(acceptsFirstResponder),\n                    (IMP)_FinderAcceptsFirstResponder, \"c@:\");\n    class_addMethod(FinderView, @selector(mouseDown:),\n                    (IMP)_FinderMouseDown, \"v@:@\");\n    class_addMethod(FinderView, @selector(keyDown:),\n                    (IMP)_FinderKeyDown, \"v@:@\");\n    objc_registerClassPair(FinderView);\n\n    g_finderView = [[FinderView alloc]\n        initWithFrame:CGRectMake(0, 0, FINDER_WIN_W, FINDER_WIN_H)];\n\n    [g_finderWindow setContentView:g_finderView];\n    [g_finderWindow makeKeyAndOrderFront:nil];\n    [g_finderWindow makeFirstResponder:g_finderView];\n\n    /* Set up menu */\n    NSMenu *menu = [[NSMenu alloc] initWithTitle:(id)CFSTR(\"Finder\")];\n    [NSApp setMainMenu:menu];\n\n    fprintf(stderr, \"[Finder] Browser window created at (%d, %d) %dx%d, showing %s (%d entries)\\n\",\n            FINDER_WIN_X, FINDER_WIN_Y, FINDER_WIN_W, FINDER_WIN_H,\n            g_current_path, g_entry_count);\n    return nil;\n}\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * main — Entry point\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nint main(int argc, const char *argv[]) {\n    (void)argc; (void)argv;\n    void *pool = objc_autoreleasePoolPush();\n\n    /* Create shared application */\n    [NSApplication sharedApplication];\n\n    /* Create delegate class dynamically */\n    Class FinderAppDelegate = objc_allocateClassPair(\n        [NSObject class], \"FinderAppDelegate\", 0);\n    class_addMethod(FinderAppDelegate,\n                    @selector(applicationDidFinishLaunching:),\n                    (IMP)_finderAppDidFinishLaunching, \"v@:@\");\n    objc_registerClassPair(FinderAppDelegate);\n\n    /* Create delegate instance and set on NSApp */\n    id delegate = [FinderAppDelegate new];\n    [NSApp setDelegate:delegate];\n\n    /* Run the event loop */\n    [NSApp run];\n\n    objc_autoreleasePoolPop(pool);\n    return 0;\n}\n"
}
```

```json
{
```

```json
  "content": "/*\n * Kiseki OS - Terminal.app\n *\n * A real terminal emulator faithfully matching macOS Terminal.app architecture:\n *   - Allocates a PTY pair via openpty()\n *   - Forks a child process running /bin/bash with proper session setup\n *   - Full VT100/ANSI terminal emulator (matching WindowServer's built-in\n *     implementation which follows XNU gc_putchar)\n *   - 80x24 character cell display with 8-colour SGR, bold, underline, reverse\n *   - Non-blocking reads from PTY master fd each run loop iteration\n *   - Keyboard input written to PTY master fd (not a local buffer)\n *\n * Dual-target: compiles with both -fobjc-runtime=gnustep-1.9 (Kiseki)\n * and -fobjc-runtime=macosx (macOS).  Uses the C runtime API throughout\n * (objc_msgSend, objc_getClass, etc.) so no @interface/@implementation\n * is needed for AppKit classes.\n *\n * Compiled with COMDAT-stripping pipeline (same as AppKit / Dock.app).\n *\n * Reference: WindowServer.c term_putc(), XNU osfmk/console/video_console.c\n */\n\n#import <AppKit/AppKit.h>\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * ObjC runtime functions for dynamic class creation\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nextern Class  objc_allocateClassPair(Class superclass, const char *name, size_t extraBytes);\nextern void   objc_registerClassPair(Class cls);\nextern BOOL   class_addMethod(Class cls, SEL name, IMP imp, const char *types);\nextern void  *objc_autoreleasePoolPush(void);\nextern void   objc_autoreleasePoolPop(void *pool);\n\n/* C library extras not in framework headers */\nextern int    fprintf(void *stream, const char *fmt, ...);\nextern int    snprintf(char *str, size_t size, const char *fmt, ...);\nextern void  *memmove(void *dst, const void *src, size_t n);\nextern void **__stderrp;\n#define stderr (*__stderrp)\n\n/* POSIX / BSD types */\ntypedef int32_t pid_t;\ntypedef signed long ssize_t;\n\n/* POSIX / BSD syscall wrappers from libSystem */\nextern int   openpty(int *master, int *slave, char *name, void *termp, void *winp);\nextern pid_t fork(void);\nextern int   execve(const char *path, char *const argv[], char *const envp[]);\nextern void  _exit(int status) __attribute__((noreturn));\nextern int   close(int fd);\nextern int   dup2(int oldfd, int newfd);\nextern pid_t setsid(void);\nextern ssize_t read(int fd, void *buf, size_t count);\nextern ssize_t write(int fd, const void *buf, size_t count);\nextern int   fcntl(int fd, int cmd, ...);\nextern pid_t waitpid(pid_t pid, int *status, int options);\nextern int   ioctl(int fd, unsigned long request, ...);\nextern char *getenv(const char *name);\n\n/* fcntl commands */\n#define F_GETFL         3\n#define F_SETFL         4\n#define O_NONBLOCK      0x0004\n#define O_RDWR          0x0002\n\n/* ioctl for controlling terminal */\n#define TIOCSCTTY       0x20007461\n#define TIOCSWINSZ      0x80087467\n\n/* waitpid flags */\n#define WNOHANG         1\n\n/* stdin/stdout/stderr fd numbers */\n#define STDIN_FILENO    0\n#define STDOUT_FILENO   1\n#define STDERR_FILENO   2\n\n/* struct winsize for TIOCSWINSZ */\nstruct winsize {\n    uint16_t ws_row;\n    uint16_t ws_col;\n    uint16_t ws_xpixel;\n    uint16_t ws_ypixel;\n};\n\n/* errno — we only need EAGAIN */\nextern int errno;\n#define EAGAIN          35\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * HID Keycodes (matching WindowServer.c definitions)\n *\n * These are Linux-style HID keycodes sent by WindowServer in\n * ws_event_key_t.keycode for client-managed windows.\n * ============================================================================ */\n\n#define KEY_ESC             1\n#define KEY_BACKSPACE       14\n#define KEY_TAB             15\n#define KEY_ENTER           28\n#define KEY_LEFTCTRL        29\n#define KEY_LEFTSHIFT       42\n#define KEY_RIGHTSHIFT      54\n#define KEY_LEFTALT         56\n#define KEY_CAPSLOCK        58\n#define KEY_F1              59\n#define KEY_F2              60\n#define KEY_F3              61\n#define KEY_F4              62\n#define KEY_F5              63\n#define KEY_F6              64\n#define KEY_F7              65\n#define KEY_F8              66\n#define KEY_F9              67\n#define KEY_F10             68\n#define KEY_F11             87\n#define KEY_F12             88\n#define KEY_RIGHTCTRL       97\n#define KEY_RIGHTALT        100\n#define KEY_HOME            102\n#define KEY_UP              103\n#define KEY_PAGEUP          104\n#define KEY_LEFT            105\n#define KEY_RIGHT           106\n#define KEY_END             107\n#define KEY_DOWN            108\n#define KEY_PAGEDOWN        109\n#define KEY_INSERT          110\n#define KEY_DELETE          111\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * Terminal Constants — Matching WindowServer's built-in terminal\n * ============================================================================ */\n\n#define TERM_COLS           80\n#define TERM_ROWS           24\n#define CHAR_WIDTH          8\n#define CHAR_HEIGHT         16\n#define TERM_WIDTH          (TERM_COLS * CHAR_WIDTH)    /* 640 */\n#define TERM_HEIGHT         (TERM_ROWS * CHAR_HEIGHT)   /* 384 */\n\n/* VT100 parser states (matching XNU gc_putchar / WindowServer.c) */\n#define VT_NORMAL           0\n#define VT_ESC              1\n#define VT_CSI_INIT         2\n#define VT_CSI_PARS         3\n#define VT_DEC_PRIV         4\n\n#define VT_MAXPARS          16\n\n/* SGR attribute flags */\n#define ATTR_NONE           0x00\n#define ATTR_BOLD           0x01\n#define ATTR_UNDERLINE      0x02\n#define ATTR_REVERSE        0x04\n\n/* Default ANSI colour indices */\n#define DEFAULT_FG_IDX      7       /* White/light grey */\n#define DEFAULT_BG_IDX      0       /* Black */\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * ANSI Colour Tables (RGB float values for CGContext)\n *\n * Standard 8-colour ANSI palette. Bold promotes to bright.\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nstatic const CGFloat ansi_colours_r[8] = { 0.00, 0.67, 0.00, 0.67, 0.00, 0.67, 0.00, 0.80 };\nstatic const CGFloat ansi_colours_g[8] = { 0.00, 0.00, 0.67, 0.67, 0.00, 0.00, 0.67, 0.80 };\nstatic const CGFloat ansi_colours_b[8] = { 0.00, 0.00, 0.00, 0.00, 0.67, 0.67, 0.67, 0.80 };\n\nstatic const CGFloat ansi_bright_r[8]  = { 0.33, 1.00, 0.33, 1.00, 0.33, 1.00, 0.33, 1.00 };\nstatic const CGFloat ansi_bright_g[8]  = { 0.33, 0.33, 1.00, 1.00, 0.33, 0.33, 1.00, 1.00 };\nstatic const CGFloat ansi_bright_b[8]  = { 0.33, 0.33, 0.33, 0.33, 1.00, 1.00, 1.00, 1.00 };\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * Terminal State — Per-window VT100 emulator state\n *\n * Matching WindowServer.c struct ws_term_state exactly.\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nstatic struct {\n    /* Character cell grid (struct-of-arrays, matching WindowServer) */\n    unsigned char   cells[TERM_ROWS][TERM_COLS];\n    uint8_t         cell_fg[TERM_ROWS][TERM_COLS];\n    uint8_t         cell_bg[TERM_ROWS][TERM_COLS];\n    uint8_t         cell_attr[TERM_ROWS][TERM_COLS];\n\n    /* Cursor position (0-based) */\n    uint32_t        cur_col;\n    uint32_t        cur_row;\n\n    /* VT100 parser state (matching XNU gc_putchar) */\n    int             vt_state;\n    uint32_t        vt_par[VT_MAXPARS];\n    uint32_t        vt_numpars;\n\n    /* Current text attributes */\n    uint8_t         vt_attr;\n    uint8_t         vt_fg_idx;\n    uint8_t         vt_bg_idx;\n\n    /* Autowrap mode (DECAWM) */\n    int             vt_wrap_mode;\n\n    /* Saved cursor (DECSC/DECRC) */\n    uint32_t        saved_col;\n    uint32_t        saved_row;\n    uint8_t         saved_attr;\n    uint8_t         saved_fg_idx;\n    uint8_t         saved_bg_idx;\n\n    /* Dirty flag — set when content has changed */\n    int             dirty;\n} term;\n\n/* PTY state */\nstatic int       g_master_fd = -1;      /* PTY master file descriptor */\nstatic pid_t     g_shell_pid = -1;      /* Shell child process PID */\nstatic NSView   *g_terminalView = nil;  /* Cached view for redraw */\nstatic NSWindow *g_window = nil;        /* Cached window */\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * VT100 Terminal Emulator\n *\n * Faithfully matching WindowServer.c term_init/term_putc/term_scroll_up/\n * term_clear_row/term_csi_dispatch/term_dec_priv_dispatch.\n *\n * Reference: XNU osfmk/console/video_console.c gc_putchar()\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nstatic void term_init(void)\n{\n    memset(&term, 0, sizeof(term));\n    term.vt_state = VT_NORMAL;\n    term.vt_attr = ATTR_NONE;\n    term.vt_fg_idx = DEFAULT_FG_IDX;\n    term.vt_bg_idx = DEFAULT_BG_IDX;\n    term.vt_wrap_mode = 1;\n\n    for (uint32_t r = 0; r < TERM_ROWS; r++) {\n        for (uint32_t c = 0; c < TERM_COLS; c++) {\n            term.cells[r][c] = ' ';\n            term.cell_fg[r][c] = DEFAULT_FG_IDX;\n            term.cell_bg[r][c] = DEFAULT_BG_IDX;\n            term.cell_attr[r][c] = ATTR_NONE;\n        }\n    }\n    term.dirty = 1;\n}\n\nstatic void term_scroll_up(void)\n{\n    memmove(&term.cells[0], &term.cells[1],\n            (TERM_ROWS - 1) * TERM_COLS);\n    memmove(&term.cell_fg[0], &term.cell_fg[1],\n            (TERM_ROWS - 1) * TERM_COLS);\n    memmove(&term.cell_bg[0], &term.cell_bg[1],\n            (TERM_ROWS - 1) * TERM_COLS);\n    memmove(&term.cell_attr[0], &term.cell_attr[1],\n            (TERM_ROWS - 1) * TERM_COLS);\n\n    for (uint32_t c = 0; c < TERM_COLS; c++) {\n        term.cells[TERM_ROWS - 1][c] = ' ';\n        term.cell_fg[TERM_ROWS - 1][c] = term.vt_fg_idx;\n        term.cell_bg[TERM_ROWS - 1][c] = term.vt_bg_idx;\n        term.cell_attr[TERM_ROWS - 1][c] = ATTR_NONE;\n    }\n    term.dirty = 1;\n}\n\nstatic void term_scroll_down(void)\n{\n    memmove(&term.cells[1], &term.cells[0],\n            (TERM_ROWS - 1) * TERM_COLS);\n    memmove(&term.cell_fg[1], &term.cell_fg[0],\n            (TERM_ROWS - 1) * TERM_COLS);\n    memmove(&term.cell_bg[1], &term.cell_bg[0],\n            (TERM_ROWS - 1) * TERM_COLS);\n    memmove(&term.cell_attr[1], &term.cell_attr[0],\n            (TERM_ROWS - 1) * TERM_COLS);\n\n    for (uint32_t c = 0; c < TERM_COLS; c++) {\n        term.cells[0][c] = ' ';\n        term.cell_fg[0][c] = term.vt_fg_idx;\n        term.cell_bg[0][c] = term.vt_bg_idx;\n        term.cell_attr[0][c] = ATTR_NONE;\n    }\n    term.dirty = 1;\n}\n\nstatic void term_clear_row(uint32_t row, uint32_t from, uint32_t to)\n{\n    if (to > TERM_COLS) to = TERM_COLS;\n    for (uint32_t c = from; c < to; c++) {\n        term.cells[row][c] = ' ';\n        term.cell_fg[row][c] = term.vt_fg_idx;\n        term.cell_bg[row][c] = term.vt_bg_idx;\n        term.cell_attr[row][c] = ATTR_NONE;\n    }\n    term.dirty = 1;\n}\n\nstatic void term_csi_dispatch(unsigned char cmd)\n{\n    uint32_t n;\n\n    switch (cmd) {\n    case 'A':\n        n = term.vt_par[0] ? term.vt_par[0] : 1;\n        if (n > term.cur_row) term.cur_row = 0;\n        else term.cur_row -= n;\n        break;\n\n    case 'B':\n        n = term.vt_par[0] ? term.vt_par[0] : 1;\n        term.cur_row += n;\n        if (term.cur_row >= TERM_ROWS) term.cur_row = TERM_ROWS - 1;\n        break;\n\n    case 'C':\n        n = term.vt_par[0] ? term.vt_par[0] : 1;\n        term.cur_col += n;\n        if (term.cur_col >= TERM_COLS) term.cur_col = TERM_COLS - 1;\n        break;\n\n    case 'D':\n        n = term.vt_par[0] ? term.vt_par[0] : 1;\n        if (n > term.cur_col) term.cur_col = 0;\n        else term.cur_col -= n;\n        break;\n\n    case 'H':\n    case 'f':\n        term.cur_row = term.vt_par[0] ? term.vt_par[0] - 1 : 0;\n        term.cur_col = (term.vt_numpars >= 2 && term.vt_par[1]) ?\n                        term.vt_par[1] - 1 : 0;\n        if (term.cur_row >= TERM_ROWS) term.cur_row = TERM_ROWS - 1;\n        if (term.cur_col >= TERM_COLS) term.cur_col = TERM_COLS - 1;\n        break;\n\n    case 'G':\n        term.cur_col = term.vt_par[0] ? term.vt_par[0] - 1 : 0;\n        if (term.cur_col >= TERM_COLS) term.cur_col = TERM_COLS - 1;\n        break;\n\n    case 'd':\n        term.cur_row = term.vt_par[0] ? term.vt_par[0] - 1 : 0;\n        if (term.cur_row >= TERM_ROWS) term.cur_row = TERM_ROWS - 1;\n        break;\n\n    case 'J':\n        switch (term.vt_par[0]) {\n        case 0:\n            term_clear_row(term.cur_row, term.cur_col, TERM_COLS);\n            for (uint32_t r = term.cur_row + 1; r < TERM_ROWS; r++)\n                term_clear_row(r, 0, TERM_COLS);\n            break;\n        case 1:\n            for (uint32_t r = 0; r < term.cur_row; r++)\n                term_clear_row(r, 0, TERM_COLS);\n            term_clear_row(term.cur_row, 0, term.cur_col + 1);\n            break;\n        case 2:\n            for (uint32_t r = 0; r < TERM_ROWS; r++)\n                term_clear_row(r, 0, TERM_COLS);\n            break;\n        }\n        break;\n\n    case 'K':\n        switch (term.vt_par[0]) {\n        case 0: term_clear_row(term.cur_row, term.cur_col, TERM_COLS); break;\n        case 1: term_clear_row(term.cur_row, 0, term.cur_col + 1); break;\n        case 2: term_clear_row(term.cur_row, 0, TERM_COLS); break;\n        }\n        break;\n\n    case 'X':\n        n = term.vt_par[0] ? term.vt_par[0] : 1;\n        term_clear_row(term.cur_row, term.cur_col, term.cur_col + n);\n        break;\n\n    case 'P':\n        n = term.vt_par[0] ? term.vt_par[0] : 1;\n        if (term.cur_col + n > TERM_COLS) n = TERM_COLS - term.cur_col;\n        for (uint32_t c = term.cur_col; c + n < TERM_COLS; c++) {\n            term.cells[term.cur_row][c] = term.cells[term.cur_row][c + n];\n            term.cell_fg[term.cur_row][c] = term.cell_fg[term.cur_row][c + n];\n            term.cell_bg[term.cur_row][c] = term.cell_bg[term.cur_row][c + n];\n            term.cell_attr[term.cur_row][c] = term.cell_attr[term.cur_row][c + n];\n        }\n        term_clear_row(term.cur_row, TERM_COLS - n, TERM_COLS);\n        term.dirty = 1;\n        break;\n\n    case 'L':\n        n = term.vt_par[0] ? term.vt_par[0] : 1;\n        if (term.cur_row + n < TERM_ROWS) {\n            for (uint32_t r = TERM_ROWS - 1; r >= term.cur_row + n; r--) {\n                memcpy(term.cells[r], term.cells[r - n], TERM_COLS);\n                memcpy(term.cell_fg[r], term.cell_fg[r - n], TERM_COLS);\n                memcpy(term.cell_bg[r], term.cell_bg[r - n], TERM_COLS);\n                memcpy(term.cell_attr[r], term.cell_attr[r - n], TERM_COLS);\n            }\n        }\n        for (uint32_t r = term.cur_row; r < term.cur_row + n && r < TERM_ROWS; r++)\n            term_clear_row(r, 0, TERM_COLS);\n        term.dirty = 1;\n        break;\n\n    case 'M':\n        n = term.vt_par[0] ? term.vt_par[0] : 1;\n        if (term.cur_row + n < TERM_ROWS) {\n            for (uint32_t r = term.cur_row; r + n < TERM_ROWS; r++) {\n                memcpy(term.cells[r], term.cells[r + n], TERM_COLS);\n                memcpy(term.cell_fg[r], term.cell_fg[r + n], TERM_COLS);\n                memcpy(term.cell_bg[r], term.cell_bg[r + n], TERM_COLS);\n                memcpy(term.cell_attr[r], term.cell_attr[r + n], TERM_COLS);\n            }\n        }\n        for (uint32_t r = TERM_ROWS - n; r < TERM_ROWS; r++)\n            term_clear_row(r, 0, TERM_COLS);\n        term.dirty = 1;\n        break;\n\n    case 'm':\n        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < term.vt_numpars; i++) {\n            uint32_t p = term.vt_par[i];\n            if (p == 0) {\n                term.vt_attr = ATTR_NONE;\n                term.vt_fg_idx = DEFAULT_FG_IDX;\n                term.vt_bg_idx = DEFAULT_BG_IDX;\n            } else if (p == 1) { term.vt_attr |= ATTR_BOLD;\n            } else if (p == 4) { term.vt_attr |= ATTR_UNDERLINE;\n            } else if (p == 7) { term.vt_attr |= ATTR_REVERSE;\n            } else if (p == 22) { term.vt_attr &= (uint8_t)~ATTR_BOLD;\n            } else if (p == 24) { term.vt_attr &= (uint8_t)~ATTR_UNDERLINE;\n            } else if (p == 27) { term.vt_attr &= (uint8_t)~ATTR_REVERSE;\n            } else if (p >= 30 && p <= 37) { term.vt_fg_idx = (uint8_t)(p - 30);\n            } else if (p >= 40 && p <= 47) { term.vt_bg_idx = (uint8_t)(p - 40);\n            } else if (p == 39) { term.vt_fg_idx = DEFAULT_FG_IDX;\n            } else if (p == 49) { term.vt_bg_idx = DEFAULT_BG_IDX;\n            }\n        }\n        break;\n\n    case 'r':\n        term.cur_row = 0;\n        term.cur_col = 0;\n        break;\n\n    default:\n        break;\n    }\n}\n\nstatic void term_dec_priv_dispatch(unsigned char cmd)\n{\n    if (cmd == 'h' && term.vt_par[0] == 7)\n        term.vt_wrap_mode = 1;\n    else if (cmd == 'l' && term.vt_par[0] == 7)\n        term.vt_wrap_mode = 0;\n}\n\nstatic void term_putc(unsigned char ch)\n{\n    switch (term.vt_state) {\n\n    case VT_NORMAL:\n        switch (ch) {\n        case 0x00: break;\n        case 0x07: break;\n        case '\\b': case 0x7F:\n            if (term.cur_col > 0) term.cur_col--;\n            break;\n        case '\\t': {\n            uint32_t next = (term.cur_col + 8) & ~7u;\n            if (next >= TERM_COLS) next = TERM_COLS - 1;\n            term.cur_col = next;\n            break;\n        }\n        case '\\n': case 0x0B: case 0x0C:\n            term.cur_row++;\n            if (term.cur_row >= TERM_ROWS) {\n                term_scroll_up();\n                term.cur_row = TERM_ROWS - 1;\n            }\n            term.dirty = 1;\n            break;\n        case '\\r':\n            term.cur_col = 0;\n            break;\n        case 0x1B:\n            term.vt_state = VT_ESC;\n            break;\n        default:\n            if (ch >= 0x20) {\n                term.cells[term.cur_row][term.cur_col] = ch;\n                term.cell_fg[term.cur_row][term.cur_col] = term.vt_fg_idx;\n                term.cell_bg[term.cur_row][term.cur_col] = term.vt_bg_idx;\n                term.cell_attr[term.cur_row][term.cur_col] = term.vt_attr;\n                term.dirty = 1;\n                term.cur_col++;\n                if (term.cur_col >= TERM_COLS) {\n                    if (term.vt_wrap_mode) {\n                        term.cur_col = 0;\n                        term.cur_row++;\n                        if (term.cur_row >= TERM_ROWS) {\n                            term_scroll_up();\n                            term.cur_row = TERM_ROWS - 1;\n                        }\n                    } else {\n                        term.cur_col = TERM_COLS - 1;\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            break;\n        }\n        break;\n\n    case VT_ESC:\n        term.vt_state = VT_NORMAL;\n        switch (ch) {\n        case '[': term.vt_state = VT_CSI_INIT; break;\n        case 'c':\n            term_init();\n            break;\n        case 'D':\n            term.cur_row++;\n            if (term.cur_row >= TERM_ROWS) {\n                term_scroll_up();\n                term.cur_row = TERM_ROWS - 1;\n            }\n            term.dirty = 1;\n            break;\n        case 'M':\n            if (term.cur_row == 0) {\n                term_scroll_down();\n            } else {\n                term.cur_row--;\n            }\n            break;\n        case '7':\n            term.saved_col = term.cur_col;\n            term.saved_row = term.cur_row;\n            term.saved_attr = term.vt_attr;\n            term.saved_fg_idx = term.vt_fg_idx;\n            term.saved_bg_idx = term.vt_bg_idx;\n            break;\n        case '8':\n            term.cur_col = term.saved_col;\n            term.cur_row = term.saved_row;\n            term.vt_attr = term.saved_attr;\n            term.vt_fg_idx = term.saved_fg_idx;\n            term.vt_bg_idx = term.saved_bg_idx;\n            if (term.cur_row >= TERM_ROWS) term.cur_row = TERM_ROWS - 1;\n            if (term.cur_col >= TERM_COLS) term.cur_col = TERM_COLS - 1;\n            break;\n        default: break;\n        }\n        break;\n\n    case VT_CSI_INIT:\n        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < VT_MAXPARS; i++)\n            term.vt_par[i] = 0;\n        term.vt_numpars = 0;\n        term.vt_state = VT_CSI_PARS;\n        /* FALLTHROUGH */\n\n    case VT_CSI_PARS:\n        if (ch == '?') {\n            term.vt_state = VT_DEC_PRIV;\n        } else if (ch >= '0' && ch <= '9') {\n            term.vt_par[term.vt_numpars] =\n                term.vt_par[term.vt_numpars] * 10 + (ch - '0');\n        } else if (ch == ';') {\n            if (term.vt_numpars < VT_MAXPARS - 1)\n                term.vt_numpars++;\n        } else {\n            term.vt_numpars++;\n            term.vt_state = VT_NORMAL;\n            term_csi_dispatch(ch);\n        }\n        break;\n\n    case VT_DEC_PRIV:\n        if (ch >= '0' && ch <= '9') {\n            term.vt_par[0] = term.vt_par[0] * 10 + (ch - '0');\n        } else {\n            term.vt_state = VT_NORMAL;\n            term_dec_priv_dispatch(ch);\n        }\n        break;\n\n    default:\n        term.vt_state = VT_NORMAL;\n        break;\n    }\n}\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * PTY Setup — Fork shell process with proper session management\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nstatic int term_setup_pty(void)\n{\n    int master_fd = -1, slave_fd = -1;\n\n    if (openpty(&master_fd, &slave_fd, NULL, NULL, NULL) < 0) {\n        fprintf(stderr, \"[Terminal] openpty() failed\\n\");\n        return -1;\n    }\n\n    int flags = fcntl(master_fd, F_GETFL, 0);\n    fcntl(master_fd, F_SETFL, flags | O_NONBLOCK);\n\n    pid_t pid = fork();\n    if (pid < 0) {\n        fprintf(stderr, \"[Terminal] fork() failed\\n\");\n        close(master_fd);\n        close(slave_fd);\n        return -1;\n    }\n\n    if (pid == 0) {\n        /* === Child process === */\n        close(master_fd);\n        setsid();\n        ioctl(slave_fd, TIOCSCTTY, 0);\n\n        struct winsize ws;\n        ws.ws_row = TERM_ROWS;\n        ws.ws_col = TERM_COLS;\n        ws.ws_xpixel = TERM_WIDTH;\n        ws.ws_ypixel = TERM_HEIGHT;\n        ioctl(slave_fd, TIOCSWINSZ, &ws);\n\n        dup2(slave_fd, STDIN_FILENO);\n        dup2(slave_fd, STDOUT_FILENO);\n        dup2(slave_fd, STDERR_FILENO);\n        if (slave_fd > STDERR_FILENO)\n            close(slave_fd);\n\n        const char *home    = getenv(\"HOME\");\n        const char *user    = getenv(\"USER\");\n        const char *logname = getenv(\"LOGNAME\");\n        const char *shell   = getenv(\"SHELL\");\n        const char *path_env = getenv(\"PATH\");\n\n        char env_home[80], env_user[48], env_logname[48];\n        char env_shell[48], env_path[256];\n\n        snprintf(env_home,    sizeof(env_home),    \"HOME=%s\",    home     ? home     : \"/root\");\n        snprintf(env_user,    sizeof(env_user),    \"USER=%s\",    user     ? user     : \"root\");\n        snprintf(env_logname, sizeof(env_logname), \"LOGNAME=%s\", logname  ? logname  : \"root\");\n        snprintf(env_shell,   sizeof(env_shell),   \"SHELL=%s\",   shell    ? shell    : \"/bin/bash\");\n        snprintf(env_path,    sizeof(env_path),    \"PATH=%s\",    path_env ? path_env : \"/bin:/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin\");\n\n        char *envp[] = {\n            env_home,\n            env_path,\n            \"TERM=vt100\",\n            env_shell,\n            env_user,\n            env_logname,\n            \"COLUMNS=80\",\n            \"LINES=24\",\n            NULL\n        };\n\n        const char *user_shell = shell ? shell : \"/bin/bash\";\n        char *argv[] = { (char *)user_shell, \"--login\", NULL };\n        execve(user_shell, argv, envp);\n\n        argv[0] = \"/bin/bash\";\n        execve(\"/bin/bash\", argv, envp);\n\n        argv[0] = \"/bin/sh\";\n        execve(\"/bin/sh\", argv, envp);\n\n        _exit(127);\n    }\n\n    /* === Parent process === */\n    close(slave_fd);\n\n    g_master_fd = master_fd;\n    g_shell_pid = pid;\n\n    fprintf(stderr, \"[Terminal] PTY established: master_fd=%d, shell PID=%d\\n\",\n            master_fd, pid);\n    return 0;\n}\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * PTY I/O — Non-blocking read from master fd\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nstatic void term_read_pty(void)\n{\n    if (g_master_fd < 0) return;\n\n    char buf[4096];\n    ssize_t n = read(g_master_fd, buf, sizeof(buf));\n\n    if (n > 0) {\n        for (ssize_t i = 0; i < n; i++)\n            term_putc((unsigned char)buf[i]);\n    } else if (n == 0) {\n        fprintf(stderr, \"[Terminal] Shell exited (EOF on master)\\n\");\n        close(g_master_fd);\n        g_master_fd = -1;\n\n        if (g_shell_pid > 0) {\n            int status = 0;\n            waitpid(g_shell_pid, &status, 0);\n            g_shell_pid = -1;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * TerminalView — Custom NSView subclass for the terminal display\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nstatic id _TerminalDrawRect(id self, SEL _cmd, CGRect dirtyRect) {\n    (void)self; (void)_cmd; (void)dirtyRect;\n\n    NSGraphicsContext *gctx = [NSGraphicsContext currentContext];\n    if (!gctx) return nil;\n\n    CGContextRef ctx = [gctx CGContext];\n    if (!ctx) return nil;\n\n    /* Render each cell */\n    for (uint32_t row = 0; row < TERM_ROWS; row++) {\n        CGFloat y = (CGFloat)(TERM_HEIGHT - (row + 1) * CHAR_HEIGHT);\n\n        for (uint32_t col = 0; col < TERM_COLS; col++) {\n            CGFloat x = (CGFloat)(col * CHAR_WIDTH);\n            unsigned char ch = term.cells[row][col];\n            uint8_t fg_idx = term.cell_fg[row][col];\n            uint8_t bg_idx = term.cell_bg[row][col];\n            uint8_t attr = term.cell_attr[row][col];\n\n            CGFloat fg_r, fg_g, fg_b;\n            CGFloat bg_r, bg_g, bg_b;\n\n            if (attr & ATTR_REVERSE) {\n                fg_r = ansi_colours_r[bg_idx & 7];\n                fg_g = ansi_colours_g[bg_idx & 7];\n                fg_b = ansi_colours_b[bg_idx & 7];\n                bg_r = ansi_colours_r[fg_idx & 7];\n                bg_g = ansi_colours_g[fg_idx & 7];\n                bg_b = ansi_colours_b[fg_idx & 7];\n            } else {\n                if (attr & ATTR_BOLD) {\n                    fg_r = ansi_bright_r[fg_idx & 7];\n                    fg_g = ansi_bright_g[fg_idx & 7];\n                    fg_b = ansi_bright_b[fg_idx & 7];\n                } else {\n                    fg_r = ansi_colours_r[fg_idx & 7];\n                    fg_g = ansi_colours_g[fg_idx & 7];\n                    fg_b = ansi_colours_b[fg_idx & 7];\n                }\n                bg_r = ansi_colours_r[bg_idx & 7];\n                bg_g = ansi_colours_g[bg_idx & 7];\n                bg_b = ansi_colours_b[bg_idx & 7];\n            }\n\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, bg_r, bg_g, bg_b, 1.0);\n            CGContextFillRect(ctx, CGRectMake(x, y, CHAR_WIDTH, CHAR_HEIGHT));\n\n            if (ch > ' ' && ch < 0x7F) {\n                CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, fg_r, fg_g, fg_b, 1.0);\n                CGContextShowTextAtPoint(ctx, x, y, (const char *)&ch, 1);\n            }\n\n            if (attr & ATTR_UNDERLINE) {\n                CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, fg_r, fg_g, fg_b, 1.0);\n                CGContextFillRect(ctx, CGRectMake(x, y, CHAR_WIDTH, 1));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    /* Draw block cursor */\n    if (term.cur_row < TERM_ROWS && term.cur_col < TERM_COLS) {\n        CGFloat cx = (CGFloat)(term.cur_col * CHAR_WIDTH);\n        CGFloat cy = (CGFloat)(TERM_HEIGHT - (term.cur_row + 1) * CHAR_HEIGHT);\n        unsigned char ch = term.cells[term.cur_row][term.cur_col];\n        uint8_t fg_idx = term.cell_fg[term.cur_row][term.cur_col];\n        uint8_t bg_idx = term.cell_bg[term.cur_row][term.cur_col];\n        uint8_t attr   = term.cell_attr[term.cur_row][term.cur_col];\n\n        CGFloat cur_fg_r, cur_fg_g, cur_fg_b;\n        CGFloat cur_bg_r, cur_bg_g, cur_bg_b;\n\n        if (attr & ATTR_REVERSE) {\n            cur_bg_r = ansi_colours_r[bg_idx & 7];\n            cur_bg_g = ansi_colours_g[bg_idx & 7];\n            cur_bg_b = ansi_colours_b[bg_idx & 7];\n            cur_fg_r = ansi_colours_r[fg_idx & 7];\n            cur_fg_g = ansi_colours_g[fg_idx & 7];\n            cur_fg_b = ansi_colours_b[fg_idx & 7];\n        } else {\n            cur_bg_r = (attr & ATTR_BOLD) ? ansi_bright_r[fg_idx & 7] : ansi_colours_r[fg_idx & 7];\n            cur_bg_g = (attr & ATTR_BOLD) ? ansi_bright_g[fg_idx & 7] : ansi_colours_g[fg_idx & 7];\n            cur_bg_b = (attr & ATTR_BOLD) ? ansi_bright_b[fg_idx & 7] : ansi_colours_b[fg_idx & 7];\n            cur_fg_r = ansi_colours_r[bg_idx & 7];\n            cur_fg_g = ansi_colours_g[bg_idx & 7];\n            cur_fg_b = ansi_colours_b[bg_idx & 7];\n        }\n\n        CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, cur_bg_r, cur_bg_g, cur_bg_b, 1.0);\n        CGContextFillRect(ctx, CGRectMake(cx, cy, CHAR_WIDTH, CHAR_HEIGHT));\n\n        if (ch > ' ' && ch < 0x7F) {\n            CGContextSetRGBFillColor(ctx, cur_fg_r, cur_fg_g, cur_fg_b, 1.0);\n            CGContextShowTextAtPoint(ctx, cx, cy, (const char *)&ch, 1);\n        }\n    }\n\n    return nil;\n}\n\nstatic BOOL _TerminalAcceptsFirstResponder(id self, SEL _cmd) {\n    (void)self; (void)_cmd;\n    return YES;\n}\n\nstatic id _TerminalKeyDown(id self, SEL _cmd, id theEvent) {\n    (void)_cmd;\n\n    if (g_master_fd < 0) return nil;\n\n    NSEvent *event = (NSEvent *)theEvent;\n\n    uint16_t keyCode = [event keyCode];\n    NSUInteger modifiers = [event modifierFlags];\n    NSString *chars = [event characters];\n\n    /* Special keys: send VT100 escape sequences to PTY master */\n    switch (keyCode) {\n    case KEY_UP:\n        write(g_master_fd, \"\\033[A\", 3);\n        goto done;\n    case KEY_DOWN:\n        write(g_master_fd, \"\\033[B\", 3);\n        goto done;\n    case KEY_RIGHT:\n        write(g_master_fd, \"\\033[C\", 3);\n        goto done;\n    case KEY_LEFT:\n        write(g_master_fd, \"\\033[D\", 3);\n        goto done;\n    case KEY_HOME:\n        write(g_master_fd, \"\\033[H\", 3);\n        goto done;\n    case KEY_END:\n        write(g_master_fd, \"\\033[F\", 3);\n        goto done;\n    case KEY_DELETE:\n        write(g_master_fd, \"\\033[3~\", 4);\n        goto done;\n    case KEY_PAGEUP:\n        write(g_master_fd, \"\\033[5~\", 4);\n        goto done;\n    case KEY_PAGEDOWN:\n        write(g_master_fd, \"\\033[6~\", 4);\n        goto done;\n    }\n\n    /* Regular characters */\n    if (!chars) return nil;\n\n    uint16_t ch = [chars characterAtIndex:0];\n\n    if (ch == 0) return nil;\n\n    if ((modifiers & NSEventModifierFlagControl) && ch >= 'a' && ch <= 'z') {\n        char ctrl = (char)(ch - 'a' + 1);\n        write(g_master_fd, &ctrl, 1);\n    } else if ((modifiers & NSEventModifierFlagControl) && ch >= 'A' && ch <= 'Z') {\n        char ctrl = (char)(ch - 'A' + 1);\n        write(g_master_fd, &ctrl, 1);\n    } else if (ch < 0x80) {\n        char c = (char)ch;\n        write(g_master_fd, &c, 1);\n    }\n\ndone:\n    [(NSView *)self setNeedsDisplay:YES];\n\n    return nil;\n}\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * NSApplication Run Loop Integration\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nstatic void term_poll_and_redraw(void)\n{\n    if (g_master_fd < 0) return;\n\n    int old_dirty = term.dirty;\n    term_read_pty();\n\n    if (term.dirty && g_terminalView) {\n        [g_terminalView setNeedsDisplay:YES];\n    }\n\n    if (g_shell_pid > 0) {\n        int status = 0;\n        pid_t ret = waitpid(g_shell_pid, &status, WNOHANG);\n        if (ret > 0) {\n            fprintf(stderr, \"[Terminal] Shell process %d exited\\n\", g_shell_pid);\n            g_shell_pid = -1;\n        }\n    }\n\n    (void)old_dirty;\n}\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * TerminalAppDelegate\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nstatic id _termAppDidFinishLaunching(id self, SEL _cmd, id notification) {\n    (void)self; (void)_cmd; (void)notification;\n\n    /* Initialise VT100 terminal state */\n    term_init();\n\n    /* Set up PTY + fork shell */\n    if (term_setup_pty() < 0) {\n        fprintf(stderr, \"[Terminal] Failed to set up PTY, running in dumb mode\\n\");\n    }\n\n    /* Create the terminal window */\n    g_window = [[NSWindow alloc]\n        initWithContentRect:CGRectMake(100, 100, TERM_WIDTH, TERM_HEIGHT)\n                  styleMask:(NSWindowStyleMaskTitled | NSWindowStyleMaskClosable |\n                             NSWindowStyleMaskMiniaturizable | NSWindowStyleMaskResizable)\n                    backing:NSBackingStoreBuffered\n                      defer:NO];\n\n    [g_window setTitle:(id)CFSTR(\"Terminal\")];\n\n    /* Create TerminalView class dynamically */\n    Class TerminalView = objc_allocateClassPair(\n        [NSView class], \"TerminalView\", 0);\n    class_addMethod(TerminalView, @selector(drawRect:),\n                    (IMP)_TerminalDrawRect, \"v@:{CGRect=dddd}\");\n    class_addMethod(TerminalView, @selector(acceptsFirstResponder),\n                    (IMP)_TerminalAcceptsFirstResponder, \"c@:\");\n    class_addMethod(TerminalView, @selector(keyDown:),\n                    (IMP)_TerminalKeyDown, \"v@:@\");\n    objc_registerClassPair(TerminalView);\n\n    /* Instantiate TerminalView */\n    NSView *termView = [[TerminalView alloc]\n        initWithFrame:CGRectMake(0, 0, TERM_WIDTH, TERM_HEIGHT)];\n\n    g_terminalView = termView;\n\n    /* Set TerminalView as content view and show window */\n    [g_window setContentView:termView];\n    [g_window makeKeyAndOrderFront:nil];\n    [g_window makeFirstResponder:termView];\n\n    /* Set up menu bar */\n    NSMenu *menu = [[NSMenu alloc] initWithTitle:(id)CFSTR(\"Terminal\")];\n    [NSApp setMainMenu:menu];\n\n    fprintf(stderr, \"[Terminal] Window created (%dx%d), PTY master=%d, shell PID=%d\\n\",\n            TERM_WIDTH, TERM_HEIGHT, g_master_fd, g_shell_pid);\n    return nil;\n}\n\n/* ============================================================================\n * main — Entry point\n * ============================================================================ */\n\nint main(int argc, const char *argv[]) {\n    (void)argc; (void)argv;\n    void *pool = objc_autoreleasePoolPush();\n\n    /* Create shared application */\n    [NSApplication sharedApplication];\n\n    /* Create delegate class dynamically */\n    Class TerminalAppDelegate = objc_allocateClassPair(\n        [NSObject class], \"TerminalAppDelegate\", 0);\n    class_addMethod(TerminalAppDelegate,\n                    @selector(applicationDidFinishLaunching:),\n                    (IMP)_termAppDidFinishLaunching, \"v@:@\");\n    objc_registerClassPair(TerminalAppDelegate);\n\n    /* Create delegate instance and set on NSApp */\n    id delegate = [TerminalAppDelegate new];\n    [NSApp setDelegate:delegate];\n\n    /*\n     * Custom run loop with PTY polling.\n     *\n     * Instead of calling [NSApp run] which enters a closed loop we\n     * cannot modify, we replicate the run loop here with PTY polling\n     * injected.\n     */\n\n    /* Step 1: finishLaunching */\n    [NSApp finishLaunching];\n\n    /* Step 2: Event loop with PTY polling */\n    for (;;) {\n        /* 2a. Poll for one WindowServer event (10ms timeout) */\n        NSEvent *event = [NSApp nextEventMatchingMask:(NSUInteger)0xFFFFFFFF\n                                            untilDate:nil\n                                               inMode:(id)CFSTR(\"kCFRunLoopDefaultMode\")\n                                              dequeue:YES];\n\n        if (event) {\n            [NSApp sendEvent:event];\n        }\n\n        /* 2c-d. Poll PTY and feed VT100 emulator */\n        term_poll_and_redraw();\n\n        /* 2e. Display dirty windows */\n        if (g_window) {\n            [g_window displayIfNeeded];\n        }\n    }\n\n    objc_autoreleasePoolPop(pool);\n    return 0;\n}\n"
}
```
